name: Risk Register Builder
description: Create and manage project risk registers

agents.name: Risk Analyst
agents.system_prompt_hint: Identify potential risks across categories: technical, schedule, resource, external, and scope. For each risk, assess probability (1-5), impact (1-5), and calculate risk score. Suggest risk owners.

agents.name: Mitigation Planner
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a risk register table with: risk ID, description, category, probability, impact, risk score, owner, mitigation strategy, contingency plan, and triggers. Prioritize by risk score. Include a risk heat map description.

author: agentfactory
